inputs.name: alignEnd
inputs.description: property that allows the facet to be aligned to the end of the facet group, right-aligned.

inputs.name: facetTitle
inputs.description:
The facet title.
For eg: for key-value facet, facetTitle is the key and the underlying object status or object number
component is the value.

inputs.name: subtitle
inputs.description: An optional subtitle to display in the rating-indicator facet

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: the type of Facet: form, key-value, image, rating-indicator
